---
title: "Maps"
subtitle: "A running log of maps I have made"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  fields: [title, description, image, date]
  sort: "date desc"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
---

Cartography and spatial analysis, collected as I go. Each entry links to the map
and a short note on how it was made.

<!--
HOW TO ADD A MAP (Kyle):
1. Duplicate example-map.qmd in this folder and rename it, e.g. carrizo-suitability.qmd
2. Export your map as PNG or JPG into ../assets/maps/
3. Edit the new file's title, description, date, and image path
The card on this page updates automatically. Delete example-map.qmd once you
have a real one, or leave it as a template.
-->
